title: From Stillness to Story: A Beginner’s Guide to AI-Driven Architectural Motion

generationOptions.description: A simple guide to the core AI technologies driving modern architectural visualisation.
generationOptions.documentDirective: Create a beginner-friendly guide that explains how a single 2D photo is transformed into a 3D video. Focus on breaking down complex terms found in the text, such as monocular depth estimation, inpainting, and temporal parallax, to help students understand the psychological and technical reasons why moving images feel more realistic than static ones.
